Package space.sunqian.fs.object.convert

Enum Class ConvertOption

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<ConvertOption>
space.sunqian.fs.object.convert.ConvertOption
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ConvertOption>, Constable
public enum ConvertOption extends Enum<ConvertOption>
Option for object conversion and data mapping.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider>
    builderOperatorProvider(@Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider operatorProvider)
    Returns an option to specify the BuilderOperatorProvider to generate data object during the conversion.
    static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull Charset>
    charset(@Nonnull Charset charset)
    Returns an option to specify the Charset if needed.
    static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull DateFormatter>
    dateFormatter(@Nonnull DateFormatter dateFormatter)
    Returns an option to specify the DateFormatter if needed.
    static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider
    getBuilderOperatorProvider(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    Returns the specified BuilderOperatorProvider from the given options, or BuilderOperatorProvider.defaultCachedProvider() if the given options does not contain a BUILDER_OPERATOR_PROVIDER.
    static @Nonnull Charset
    getCharset(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
    Returns the specified Charset from the given options, or CharsKit.defaultCharset() if the given options does not contain a CHARSET.
    static @Nonnull DateFormatter
    getDateFormatter(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
    Returns the specified DateFormatter from the given options, or DateFormatter.defaultFormatter() if the given options does not contain a DATE_FORMATTER.
    static @Nonnull IOOperator
    getIOOperator(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
    Returns the specified IOOperator from the given options, or IOOperator.defaultOperator() if the given options does not contain a IO_OPERATOR.
    static @Nonnull MapSchemaParser
    getMapSchemaParser(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    Returns the specified MapSchemaParser from the given options, or MapSchemaParser.defaultCachedParser() if the given options does not contain a MAP_SCHEMA_PARSER.
    static @Nonnull NameMapper
    getNameMapper(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
    Returns the NameMapperspecified by the options.
    static @Nonnull NumFormatter
    getNumFormatter(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
    Returns the specified NumFormatter from the given options, or NumFormatter.common() if the given options does not contain a NUM_FORMATTER.
    static @Nonnull ObjectCopier
    getObjectCopier(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    Returns the specified ObjectCopier from the given options, or ObjectCopier.defaultCopier() if the given options does not contain a OBJECT_COPIER.
    static @Nonnull ObjectSchemaParser
    getObjectSchemaParser(@Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    Returns the specified ObjectSchemaParser from the given options, or ObjectSchemaParser.defaultCachedParser() if the given options does not contain a OBJECT_SCHEMA_PARSER.
    static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,?>
    ignoreNull(boolean ignoreNull)
    Returns an option to specify whether ignores null properties from the source object in the conversion.
    static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull Object @Nonnull []>
    ignoreProperties(@Nonnull Object @Nonnull ... ignoredProperties)
    Returns an option to ignore copy properties with the specified property names (or key for map).
    static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,?>
    includeClass(boolean includeClass)
    Returns an option to specify whether includes class properties, which from Object.getClass(), for the source object in the conversion.

    ioOperator(@Nonnull IOOperator ioOperator)
    Returns an option to specify the IOOperator if needed.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • STRICT_SOURCE_TYPE_MODE

      public static final ConvertOption STRICT_SOURCE_TYPE_MODE
      Key of strictSourceTypeMode(boolean).

      Option to enable strict source type mode. In strict type mode, the conversion will strictly treat the source object as the specified source type.

      By default, this option is disabled. In this case, if some error occurs when parsing the source type, the conversion will try again with the Object.getClass() as the source type.

    • STRICT_TARGET_TYPE_MODE

      public static final ConvertOption STRICT_TARGET_TYPE_MODE
      Key of strictTargetTypeMode(boolean).

      Option to enable strict target type mode. In strict type mode, the conversion will strictly convert the source object to the target type, especially for target wildcard type and type variables.

      By default, this option is disabled. In this case, the target type for wildcard and type variables will be treated as their bounds type. For example, the target type of ? extends String will be treated as String.

    • NEW_INSTANCE_MODE

      public static final ConvertOption NEW_INSTANCE_MODE
      Key of newInstanceMode(boolean).

      Option to enable new instance mode. In new instance mode, the conversion will always create a new instance of the target type even if the target type is assignable from the source type.

      By default, this option is disabled. In this case, the conversion could return the source object if the target type is assignable from the source type.

    • OBJECT_SCHEMA_PARSER

      public static final ConvertOption OBJECT_SCHEMA_PARSER
      Key of objectSchemaParser(ObjectSchemaParser).

    • MAP_SCHEMA_PARSER

      public static final ConvertOption MAP_SCHEMA_PARSER
      Key of mapSchemaParser(MapSchemaParser).

    • BUILDER_OPERATOR_PROVIDER

      public static final ConvertOption BUILDER_OPERATOR_PROVIDER
      Key of builderOperatorProvider(BuilderOperatorProvider).

    • OBJECT_COPIER

      public static final ConvertOption OBJECT_COPIER
      Key of objectCopier(ObjectCopier).

    • NAME_MAPPER

      public static final ConvertOption NAME_MAPPER
      Key of nameMapper(NameMapper).

    • IGNORE_PROPERTIES

      public static final ConvertOption IGNORE_PROPERTIES
      Key of ignoreProperties(Object...).

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static ConvertOption[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static ConvertOption valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • strictSourceTypeMode

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,?> strictSourceTypeMode(boolean strictSourceType)
      Sets option to enable strict source type mode. In strict type mode, the conversion will strictly treat the source object as the specified source type.

      By default, this option is disabled. In this case, if some error occurs when parsing the source type, the conversion will try again with the Object.getClass() as the source type.

      Parameters:
      strictSourceType - whether to enable strict source type mode
      Returns:
      an option to specify to enable/disable strict source type mode

    • isStrictSourceTypeMode

      public static boolean isStrictSourceTypeMode(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
      Returns whether the given options specify to enable strict source type mode. The related option configuration method is strictSourceTypeMode(boolean).
      Parameters:
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      true if the given options specify to enable strict source type mode, false otherwise

    • strictTargetTypeMode

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,?> strictTargetTypeMode(boolean strictTargetType)
      Sets option to enable new instance mode. In new instance mode, the conversion will always create a new instance of the target type even if the target type is assignable from the source type.

      By default, this option is disabled. In this case, the conversion could return the source object if the target type is assignable from the source type.

      Parameters:
      strictTargetType - whether to enable strict target type mode
      Returns:
      an option to specify to enable/disable strict target type mode

    • isStrictTargetTypeMode

      public static boolean isStrictTargetTypeMode(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
      Returns whether the given options specify to enable strict target type mode. The related option configuration method is strictTargetTypeMode(boolean).
      Parameters:
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      true if the given options specify to enable strict target type mode, false otherwise

    • newInstanceMode

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,?> newInstanceMode(boolean newInstanceMode)
      Sets option to enable new instance mode. In new instance mode, the conversion will always create a new instance of the target type even if the target type is assignable from the source type.

      By default, this option is disabled. In this case, the conversion could return the source object if the target type is assignable from the source type.

      Parameters:
      newInstanceMode - whether to enable new instance mode
      Returns:
      an option to specify to enable/disable new instance mode

    • isNewInstanceMode

      public static boolean isNewInstanceMode(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
      Returns whether the given options specify to enable new instance mode. The related option configuration method is newInstanceMode(boolean).
      Parameters:
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      true if the given options specify to enable new instance mode, false otherwise

    • objectSchemaParser

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull ObjectSchemaParser> objectSchemaParser(@Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectSchemaParser schemaParser)
      Returns an option to specify the object schema parser.

      By default, ObjectSchemaParser.defaultCachedParser() is used.

      Parameters:
      schemaParser - the specified object schema parser
      Returns:
      an option to specify the object schema parser

    • getObjectSchemaParser

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull ObjectSchemaParser getObjectSchemaParser(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
      Returns the specified ObjectSchemaParser from the given options, or ObjectSchemaParser.defaultCachedParser() if the given options does not contain a OBJECT_SCHEMA_PARSER.
      Parameters:
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      the specified ObjectSchemaParser from the given options, or ObjectSchemaParser.defaultCachedParser() if the given options does not contain a OBJECT_SCHEMA_PARSER

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull MapSchemaParser> mapSchemaParser(@Nonnull @Nonnull MapSchemaParser schemaParser)
      Returns an option to specify the map schema parser.

      By default, MapSchemaParser.defaultCachedParser() is used.

      Parameters:
      schemaParser - the specified map schema parser
      Returns:
      an option to specify the map schema parser

    • getMapSchemaParser

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull MapSchemaParser getMapSchemaParser(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)

    • builderOperatorProvider

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider> builderOperatorProvider(@Nonnull @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider operatorProvider)
      Returns an option to specify the BuilderOperatorProvider to generate data object during the conversion.

      By default, the BuilderOperatorProvider.defaultCachedProvider() is used.

      Parameters:
      operatorProvider - the BuilderOperatorProvider to be specified
      Returns:
      an option to specify the BuilderOperatorProvider to generate data object during the conversion

    • getBuilderOperatorProvider

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull BuilderOperatorProvider getBuilderOperatorProvider(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
      Returns the specified BuilderOperatorProvider from the given options, or BuilderOperatorProvider.defaultCachedProvider() if the given options does not contain a BUILDER_OPERATOR_PROVIDER.
      Parameters:
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      the specified BuilderOperatorProvider from the given options, or BuilderOperatorProvider.defaultCachedProvider() if the given options does not contain a BUILDER_OPERATOR_PROVIDER

    • objectCopier

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull ObjectCopier> objectCopier(@Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectCopier objectCopier)
      Returns an option to specify the ObjectCopier.

      By default, the ObjectCopier.defaultCopier() is used.

      Parameters:
      objectCopier - the ObjectCopier to be specified
      Returns:
      an option to specify the ObjectCopier

    • getObjectCopier

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull ObjectCopier getObjectCopier(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
      Returns the specified ObjectCopier from the given options, or ObjectCopier.defaultCopier() if the given options does not contain a OBJECT_COPIER.
      Parameters:
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      the specified ObjectCopier from the given options, or ObjectCopier.defaultCopier() if the given options does not contain a OBJECT_COPIER

    • nameMapper

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull NameMapper> nameMapper(@Nonnull @Nonnull NameMapper nameMapper)
      Returns an option to specify the NameMapper.

      Note that this configuration is only valid for the String type names, mainly for the property names (both source and target), and executed before the configured ObjectCopier.Handler (if any, and it means the property name received by the property mapper will be mapped by the name mapper first). For the property names whose type is not String, such as non-String keys of a Map, this configuration will not take effect.

      By default, this option is disabled.

      Parameters:
      nameMapper - the NameMapper to be specified
      Returns:
      an option to specify the NameMapper

    • getNameMapper

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull NameMapper getNameMapper(@Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
      Returns the NameMapperspecified by the options. The related option nameMapper(NameMapper).
      Parameters:
      options - the options to check
      Returns:
      the NameMapper specified by the options, or NameMapper.keep() if not specified

    • ignoreProperties

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,@Nonnull Object @Nonnull []> ignoreProperties(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object @Nonnull ... ignoredProperties)
      Returns an option to ignore copy properties with the specified property names (or key for map).

      By default, all readable properties will be attempted to be copied.

      Parameters:
      ignoredProperties - the names (or key) of ignored properties
      Returns:
      an option to ignore copy properties with the specified property names (or key for map)

    • isIgnoreProperty

      public static boolean isIgnoreProperty(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object propertyName, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull [] options)
      Check whether the property is specified to ignore by the given options. The related option ignoreProperties(Object...).
      Parameters:
      propertyName - the property name to check
      options - the given options
      Returns:
      true if the property is specified to ignore, false otherwise

    • ignoreNull

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,?> ignoreNull(boolean ignoreNull)
      Returns an option to specify whether ignores null properties from the source object in the conversion.

      By default, this option is disabled.

      Parameters:
      ignoreNull - whether ignores null properties from the source object
      Returns:
      an option to specify to ignore null properties from the source object in the conversion

      Parameters:
      options - the given options to check
      Returns:
      true if the option specifies to enable to ignore null values, false otherwise

    • includeClass

      @Nonnull public static @Nonnull Option<@Nonnull ConvertOption,?> includeClass(boolean includeClass)
      Returns an option to specify whether includes class properties, which from Object.getClass(), for the source object in the conversion.

      By default, this option is disabled.

      Parameters:
      includeClass - whether includes class properties, which from Object.getClass(), for the source object
      Returns:
      an option to specify to include class properties, which from Object.getClass(), for the source object in the conversion

      Returns:
      true if the option specifies to enable to include class properties, false otherwise
